package rulefixtures

import (
	rand "math/rand"
)

// scenario for insecure_random_for_security: `math/rand` usage (any of `rand.Int`, `rand.Intn`, `rand.Read`, `rand.New`) in functions whose names suggest security use (token generation, key generation, password, nonce, salt, session)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: error.
func Generatescenario721PositiveToken() int {
	return rand.Intn(1000000)
}
